title: salix × rostanii
intro: Salix × rostanii, also known as the Rostan's willow or hybrid willow, is a rare and short-lived deciduous shrub or small tree that is a natural hybrid of two Salix species. The bark and leaves of Salix × rostanii contain salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties, which is used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Salix × rostanii include its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as arthritis and headaches. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
